name: pi-patty-bg-tasks
description_en: Background tasks extension for pi. Claude Code parity — auto-background after 120s, run_in_background flag, Ctrl+B manual background with live hint, streaming jobs attach, file-fd output capture, cooperative steering, agent_bg with progress streaming, and
